about.title: About TokenBreak
about.subtitle: Enjoy short-form video while your AI works, then pause the moment it needs your attention.
about.overviewBody: TokenBreak plays YouTube Shorts, Instagram Reels, and TikTok while tools like Codex or Claude Code work in the background, then pauses the video when your AI needs input or confirmation.
about.whyBody: A surprising amount of AI coding time is just waiting. TokenBreak turns that dead time into something lighter, more fun, and easier to come back from when your tool needs you.
about.supportBody: If TokenBreak makes your workday a little more fun, consider supporting development and maintenance with one of the addresses below.
about.walletHint: Wallet addresses can be selected and copied.
about.supportNote: Donations go toward ongoing development, testing, maintenance, and future improvements for TokenBreak.

overlay.title: AI需要你！
overlay.message: AI工具正在等待你的输入，请查看终端。

status.working: AI工作中 — 尽情享受视频吧！
